A Laragon/XAMPP/Herd alternative.

projects.name: NotASithLord/peerd
projects.description: The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A Chrome/Firefox extension that runs the agent loop in your browser — drives your tabs, spins up sandboxed compute (JS notebooks, WASM Linux VMs, client-side apps), and shares what it builds peer-to-peer. BYOK · no backend · no telemetry.
projects.full_description: The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A Chrome/Firefox extension that runs the agent loop in your browser — drives your tabs, spins up sandboxed compute (JS notebooks, WASM Linux VMs, client-side apps), and shares what it builds peer-to-peer. BYOK · no backend · no telemetry.

projects.name: Green-PT/honey-for-devs
projects.description: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) by GreenPT: a cross-tool coding skill that cuts AI coding-agent token usage and LLM API costs — write less code, less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (−53%, lossless in benchmarks) with no loss of quality. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Cline & Kiro.
projects.full_description: Honey (I Shrunk the AI) by GreenPT: a cross-tool coding skill that cuts AI coding-agent token usage and LLM API costs — write less code, less prose, and denser agent-to-agent handoffs (−53%, lossless in benchmarks) with no loss of quality. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Cline & Kiro.
